---
title: "Shalini Harwalkar"
image: "Shalini.jpeg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sharwalkar@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shalinih
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rsm-sharwalkar?tab=repositories
---

Welcome to my personal website!
